resource_notes.change: Only the all64 down stage changed: down_pack=4; hidden-N grid uses ceildiv(hidden, 4*128); four explicit FP32 output accumulator fragments; one up_shared fragment; one 128x128 FP16 down_shared buffer; T.serial K loop; each K tile copies up_logits once and statically performs four down_w copy-to-the-same-shared then gemm sequences. Gate/up is byte-identical to baseline.
resource_notes.divisibility: All formal hidden sizes are divisible by 512: 2048%512=0 and 7168%512=0. The small gate used hidden=512, intermediate=256; no hidden=256 boundary branch was added.
resource_notes.correctness: Small shape 512/256/4/568 compiled and allclosed with max_abs_error=1.52587890625e-05. Formal point 1 allclosed with max_abs_error=0.00048828125.
resource_notes.test_protocol: server-64-1; seed=81394; formal point 1 used warmup=10 and iters=100.
resource_notes.resources: Static down shared allocation is 128*128*2=32768 bytes. The four logical FP32 accumulator fragments total 4*64*128*4=131072 bytes distributed across the 512-thread CTA. Compilation emitted no register-spill, shared-limit, OOM, or runtime-resource error; exact physical register count and spill bytes were not exposed by the standard TileLang compile output. The only diagnostic was the pre-existing PDL warning for the MACA target.
resource_notes.early_stop: Formal point 1 regressed by 13.115026%, exceeding the 1% rejection threshold. Formal points 2/3 and random-groups seeds 1/20260713 were therefore not run.
